title: Summer Pockets: Kushima Kamome-hen
titleNative: Summer Pockets 久島鴎編
synopsis: Theatrical edited version of Summer Pockets following Kamome Kushima's storyline from the anime series. Kamome, who once visited Torishiro Island as a child reveals that her purpose in coming to the island is to "search for treasure", and thus sets off on an adventure with Hairi. What is the treasure hidden on the island? And what is the past that connects the two of them? (Source: TOHO Cinemas, translated)

title: Chimimo
titleNative: ちみも
synopsis: Meet hell's most adorable messenger. Chimimo might be an average demon, but he and his horde of minions have big dreams of unleashing hell on earth! Too bad a portal to the human realm drops him into the middle of the Onigami household, where the family’s three unflappable sisters rule the roost with iron fists. Now Chimimo is stuck as their freeloading roommate, and his ambitions of unleashing the apocalypse will have to wait until he can summon the willpower to get off the couch! (Source: Sentai Filmworks)

title: Chibi Maruko-chan
titleNative: ちびまる子ちゃん
synopsis: Momoko Sakura is an elementary school student who likes popular idol Momoe Yamaguchi and mangas. She is often called "Chibi Maruko-chan" due to her young age and small size. She lives together with her parents, her grandparents and her elder sister in a little town. In school, she has many friends with whom she studies and plays together everyday, including her close pal, Tama-chan; the student committee members, Maruo-kun and Migiwa-san; and the B-class trio: 'little master' Hanawa-kun, Hamaji-Bu Taro and Sekiguchi-kun. This is a fun-loving and enjoyable anime that portrays the simple things in life. (Source: Anime News Network)

titleNative: 女の園の星
synopsis: OVA bundled with a special edition of the manga's 3rd volume. The story of Onna no Sono Hoshi follows Hoshi-sensei as he experiences everyday adventures such as getting picked on by the girls in the daily classroom journal, getting saddled with looking after the class's pet dog, giving art advice to aspiring manga authors, and sometimes going out to drink with his coworkers. (Source: Crunchyroll)

Ryuumonbuchi celebrate Koromo's birthday. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Bananya Around the World
titleNative: ばなにゃ あらうんど ざ わーるど
synopsis: Bananya returns! The mysterious cat who lives inside a banana is back for a new adventure when a ball of light appears. After the ball flashes, a new cat named Baby Sweet emerges.
